description_long: This is a rectangular, upright vending machine with a predominantly black and green exterior. The front panel features a large green section with the word 'Sprunk' written diagonally in white, alongside a product selection area displaying images of various bottled drinks. Above the selection buttons, there is a display area with the word 'Thirsty?' and a faded, weathered section at the top. The machine has a product retrieval slot and a payment interface below the selection buttons. The sides and back of the machine are solid black with no visible features or markings. The overall appearance suggests a robust, metal construction typical of urban beverage vending machines.
description: A black and green upright vending machine with 'Sprunk' branding, product selection buttons, and a retrieval slot on the front. The sides and back are plain black, and the front features a display and payment area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Sprunk' branding, product selection buttons, display panel, payment interface, and retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Left side view, entirely plain and black with no visible features or markings.
description_view_2: Rear view, completely black and featureless, showing the back panel of the machine.
description_view_3: Right side view, also plain and black with no distinguishing features.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located above the product selection buttons on the front, featuring the word 'Thirsty?' and a faded, weathered area, likely for instructions or branding.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present below the product selection buttons, including a coin slot and possibly a bill acceptor, both integrated into the front panel.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: There are individual product selection buttons arranged in a grid, each labeled with an image of a drink, located centrally on the front panel.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the bottom of the front panel, beneath the payment interface, with a recessed opening.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large 'Sprunk' branding in white on a green background occupies the left side of the front panel, with additional text 'Drink' and 'Thirsty?' above the selection area.
